plc_main.name: Main Production PLC
plc_main.notes: Controls primary production line. Shutdown causes full production halt.

pump_controller_1.name: Pump Controller 1
pump_controller_1.notes: Controls primary water/fluid pump. High-pressure system.

pump_controller_2.name: Pump Controller 2 (Backup)
pump_controller_2.notes: Backup pump controller. Can be shut down if primary pump is running.

valve_controller_1.name: Valve Controller (High Pressure)
valve_controller_1.notes: Controls high-pressure relief valves. Cannot be shut down safely without pressure relief.

power_supply_main.name: Main Power Supply
power_supply_main.notes: Powers all critical OT equipment. Disconnecting causes full facility outage.

network_switch_core.name: Core Network Switch
network_switch_core.notes: Core switch connecting all OT devices. Shutdown isolates entire OT network.

windows_server.name: Windows Engineering Server
windows_server.notes: Engineering workstation for PLC programming. Not required for production.

hmi_screen_1.name: HMI Screen 1
hmi_screen_1.notes: Operator HMI. Display only - process continues without it.

monitoring_system.name: Process Monitoring System
monitoring_system.notes: Monitoring and alerting system. Shutdown reduces visibility but does not affect production.

production_database.name: Production Data Historian
production_database.notes: Stores production data and historian records. Shutdown causes data loss but not process disruption.
